description: Original cute bunny mascot for a toddler cartoon channel. White and soft pink fur, very large shiny brown eyes, long ears with pink inner ears, small pink nose, happy friendly expression, blue overalls with a yellow star, purple top with a pink bow, soft fluffy fur, round cheeks, gentle smile, child-safe design.
must_keep_consistent: same white and soft pink fur
same long ears with pink inner ears
same blue overalls with yellow star
do_not_change: do not replace with another animal
